prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约10629→12245→15835→10781→15205名，波动较大，2023年出现明显后移（15835名），2024年反弹至10781名，2025年再 次后移至15205名；近5年整体呈后移趋势，2025年基准约15205名；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2022年均为52人，2023年44人，2024年34人，2025年38人；2026 年计划40人，较2025年小幅扩招约5.3%，扩招对竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第165名持续上升至2026年第135 名，排名稳步提升，对考生吸引力有所增强；2022年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及宿舍改造问题（南区宿舍条件差），但中区宿舍已完成改造；2026年声誉文件中 无该校记录，整体舆情平稳；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上学科，整体学科实力在同类211中处于中游水平，缺乏顶尖学科对高分考生 的强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校以农学、医学、师范类为主，相关专业社会热度平稳；青海省2026年考生总数约48000人（不确定），按历史比例估算物理类约30240人 ，与2025年物理类30457人基本持平；石河子大学位于新疆，距青海较远，地域偏好对青海考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用；该校 在青海省招生占比极小（约0.4%），属跨省招生中的边缘省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较大且整体后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（38→40人）、软科排名持续上升 、声誉偏负面但无明显断档信号，以及青海省考生总数基本持平，在2025年基准15205名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约15700名，区间15200–16200名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 10629 → 12245 → 15835 → 10781 → 15205, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, there was a notable backward shift (15835), rebounding to 10781 in 2024, and then shifting back to 15205 in 2025. Over the past five years, the overall trend has been a backward shift, with a baseline of approximately 15205 in 2025. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 52 students in both 2021 and 2022, 44 in 2023, 34 in 2024, and 38 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 40 students, a slight expansion of about 5.3% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have steadily risen from 165th in 2021 to 135th in 2026, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2022, reputation evaluations were somewhat negative, mainly concerning dormitory renovation issues (poor conditions in the south campus dormitories), but the central campus dormitories have been renovated. In 2026, there are no records of this university in reputation documents, indicating overall stable public opinion. No obvious enrollment gaps have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, there are no A- or above disciplines, placing the university's overall disciplinary strength at a mid-level among similar 211 universities, lacking top-tier disciplines to strongly attract high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The university primarily focuses on agriculture, medicine, and teacher training, with stable social popularity for related majors. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Qinghai Province is approximately 48,000 (uncertain), with an estimated 30,240 in the physics category based on historical proportions, roughly the same as the 30,457 in 2025. Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Qinghai, and geographical preferences somewhat inhibit the willingness of Qinghai candidates to apply. The university's enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province is very small (about 0.4%), making it a marginal province in cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations and overall backward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion in the 2026 plan (38 to 40 students), the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, the somewhat negative reputation but no obvious gap signals, and the roughly stable total number of candidates in Qinghai Province, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 15205. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15700, with a range of 15200 to 16200.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 15200–16200, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 15000), prioritize competitive majors like Computer Science and Economics. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 16000), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 3 majors for a stable application.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum rank for liberal arts was approximately 3789; in 2025, the minimum rank for history category was approximately 2731. Rankings have significantly moved forward (numbers decreased) in recent two years. The 2025 baseline is about 2731. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 20 in 2024, 26 in 2025, and 24 in 2026, a reduction of about 7.7% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; Soft Science ranking has continuously risen to 135th in 2026, enhancing attractiveness to candidates. In 2022, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (dormitory conditions), but no significant negative public opinion in recent years. The 2026 reputation file has no record of this university, overall public opinion is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no A- or above disciplines, and the strength of liberal arts disciplines is average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The university's liberal arts enrollment majors are mainly teacher training, language, and law. The social popularity of teacher training majors has been heating up in recent years. The total number of candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000, with an estimated history category of about 17,760 based on historical proportion, a slight increase from 17,212 in 2025. Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Qinghai, and geographical preference has a certain inhibitory effect on Qinghai candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of rankings in recent two years, the enrollment reduction in 2026 (26 to 24), the rise in Soft Science ranking, and a slight increase in the number of history category candidates in Qinghai Province, competition is expected to intensify slightly (rankings move forward) based on the 2025 baseline of 2731. The predicted minimum rank is about 2600, with a range of 2100–3100.
